title: wand works
description: This mod adds new fun and interesting equipment and utilities to make the experience better
body: **Wand Works** is a Minecraft mod that brings a touch of magic and creativity into your world. It introduces powerful new wands, each with unique abilities that make gameplay more dynamic and fun. Beyond just magic, the mod also adds fresh game features and special survival-friendly tools some inspired by creative mode and Minecraft cheats that expand what you can do in everyday adventures. Whether you’re battling mobs, exploring, or building, Wand Works gives you new ways to play and shape your Minecraft experience.
